title: Human_Tissue_Nuclei_Isolation_Protocol_2021_10_18
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1jvn7","text":"Homebrew protocol to isolate nuclei from human frozen brain tissue.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: *Use PBS without Calcium Chloride and Magnesium Chloride. Note : Store at 4 °C for up to 1 month. %s %s Solution Final Conc 1 RXN 5.2 RXN 10x PBS 1x 300uL 1560uL 1M MgCl2 3mM 9uL 46.8uL D-Sucrose (342.29) 0.3M 0.3081g 1.602g ** RNasein (add on day) 0.4 U/uL 30uL 156uL Ultrapure Water Fill to: 3mL Fill to: 15.6mL Add most of the Ultrapure water, then PBS, then MgCl 2 , then Sucrose.
Then add Ultrapure water to final volume.

Note : Make fresh weekly. %s %s Solution Final Conc 1 RXN 5.2 RXN 10x PBS 1x 0.8 mL 4.16 mL 1M MgCl2 3 mM 24 uL 124.8 uL D-Sucrose 1.4 M 3.8336 g 19.935g 10% Triton X-100 0.10% 80 uL 416 uL Ultrapure Water Fill to: 8 mL Fill to: 41.6 mL Add half of the Ultrapure water, then PBS, then MgCl 2 , then Sucrose.
Then add Ultrapure water to final volume.

Note: Make fresh daily. %s %s Solution Final Conc 1 RXN 5.2 RXN 10x PBS 1x 400 uL 2080 uL 50mg/uL Ultrapure BSA 1% 800uL (40mg) 4160 uL ** RNasein (add on day) 0.2 U/uL 20 uL 104 uL Ultrapure Water Fill to: 4 mL Fill to: 20.8 mL Add most of the Ultrapure water, then PBS, then BSA.
Tilt to dissolve, do not vortex.
10% Triton X-100 ( 100 mL ) %s %s Solution Final Conc Volume Notes Triton X-100 10% 10mL Ultrapure Water Fill to: 100mL
1 Molarity (M) MgCl 2 ( 100 mL ) %s %s Solution Final Conc Volume Notes MgCl2 (FW 203.31) 1M 20.331g 203.31g/1000mL = 1M 5.08275g/100mL = 1M Ultrapure Water Fill to: 100mL
creator: Jane Balster
